chapter_title: About the Permissibility of wearing Silk by

hadith_entries.text:
398. Narrated Anas 'The Prophet
allowed Abdoul-
Rahman ibn Awf and Al-Zobayr to wear silk shirts because
they had a skin disease that caused them to itch.' (Bukhari)

399. Narrated Anas : ' Abdul-Rahman ibn Awf and Al-
Zobayr complained to the Prophet about lice (that caused
itching), so he allowed them to wear silk clothing.' (Bukhari)
